mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LOAN_PRODUCT ( product_id, provider_id, product_name, product_type_code_value_id, loan_type_code_value_id, repayment_type_code_value_id, collateral_type_code_value_id, rate_type_code_value_id, note, add_date, end_date, updated_at ) VALUES ( LOAN_PRODUCT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{providerId}, #{productName}, #{productTypeCodeValueId}, #{loanTypeCodeValueId}, #{repaymentTypeCodeValueId}, #{collateralTypeCodeValueId}, #{rateTypeCodeValueId}, #{note}, #{addDate}, #{endDate}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE LOAN_PRODUCT SET provider_id = #{providerId}, product_name = #{productName}, product_type_code_value_id = #{productTypeCodeValueId}, loan_type_code_value_id = #{loanTypeCodeValueId}, repayment_type_code_value_id = #{repaymentTypeCodeValueId}, collateral_type_code_value_id = #{collateralTypeCodeValueId}, rate_type_code_value_id = #{rateTypeCodeValueId}, note = #{note}, end_date = #{endDate}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE product_id = #{productId}
